mapper.select:
SELECT GROUP_CODE as groupCode, GROUP_CODE_NAME as groupCodeName, USE_YN as useYn, DATE_FORMAT(REG_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as regDate, DATE_FORMAT(MOD_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as modDate FROM TB_GROUP_CODE
AND GROUP_CODE_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{groupCodeName}, '%')
AND USE_YN = #{useYn}
ORDER BY GROUP_CODE
SELECT GROUP_CODE as groupCode, GROUP_CODE_NAME as groupCodeName, USE_YN as useYn FROM TB_GROUP_CODE WHERE GROUP_CODE = #{groupCode}

SELECT GROUP_CODE as groupCode, CODE as code, CODE_NAME as codeName, SORT_ORDER as sortOrder, USE_YN as useYn, DATE_FORMAT(REG_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as regDate, DATE_FORMAT(MOD_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as modDate FROM TB_CODE WHERE GROUP_CODE = #{groupCode} ORDER BY SORT_ORDER, CODE
SELECT GROUP_CODE as groupCode, CODE as code, CODE_NAME as codeName, SORT_ORDER as sortOrder, USE_YN as useYn FROM TB_CODE WHERE GROUP_CODE = #{param1} AND CODE = #{param2}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_CODE ( GROUP_CODE, CODE, CODE_NAME, SORT_ORDER, USE_YN ) VALUES ( #{groupCode}, #{code}, #{codeName}, #{sortOrder}, #{useYn} )
mapper.select: SELECT GROUP_CODE as groupCode, CODE as code, DETAIL_CODE as detailCode, DETAIL_CODE_NAME as detailCodeName, SORT_ORDER as sortOrder, USE_YN as useYn, DATE_FORMAT(REG_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as regDate, DATE_FORMAT(MOD_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as modDate FROM TB_DETAIL_CODE WHERE GROUP_CODE = #{param1} AND CODE = #{param2} ORDER BY SORT_ORDER, DETAIL_CODE

SELECT GROUP_CODE as groupCode, CODE as code, DETAIL_CODE as detailCode, DETAIL_CODE_NAME as detailCodeName, SORT_ORDER as sortOrder, USE_YN as useYn FROM TB_DETAIL_CODE WHERE GROUP_CODE = #{param1} AND CODE = #{param2} AND DETAIL_CODE = #{param3}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_DETAIL_CODE ( GROUP_CODE, CODE, DETAIL_CODE, DETAIL_CODE_NAME, SORT_ORDER, USE_YN ) VALUES ( #{groupCode}, #{code}, #{detailCode}, #{detailCodeName}, #{sortOrder}, #{useYn} )
